g.text: 1 VM or container serves up to N users. Each user gets /workspace/{sandbox-id}/
Orchestrator scopes all exec WorkDir and file paths per user. Directory-level isolation.
Optional hardening: per-user UID, PID namespace, hidepid, workspace chmod 0700
